programs.programName: NC Senior Community Service Employment Program (SCSEP)

verified.notes: Age requirement confirmed from NC DHHS official source. Income limit is 125% of federal poverty level (not fixed dollar amount; varies annually by household size and is set federally). Specific monthly income thresholds for household sizes 1 and 2 not provided in search results; contact local program for current year figures. Phone number is for Mid-Carolina Regional Council SCSEP in Fayetteville, NC. Program remains active as of October 2025 per recent news report, though funding uncertainty noted for summer 2026.

programs.programName: Project C.A.R.E. (Caregiver Alternatives to Running on Empty)

verified.notes: No eligibility criteria for age, income, or assets found in sources; program provides services including respite subject to availability but no financial tests specified. Phone from state director contact.

programs.notes: No eligibility criteria for age, income, or assets found in sources; program provides services including respite subject to availability but no financial tests specified. Phone from state director contact.

verified.notes: Age requirement: 65+ OR 18-64 and disabled per Social Security definition (minimum age is 18 for disabled individuals). Income limits exist but are determined case-by-case and vary by county; no statewide maximum found in search results. No asset limits specified in retrieved sources. No official statewide phone number found; applicants must contact local Department of Social Services. Program is active as of January 2026 per official NC DHHS manual.
